best_prompt: You are a causal reasoning expert. Given a scenario with events and an outcome, determine if a specified factor directly caused the outcome. Consider what would have happened if the factor was absent, and evaluate whether the outcome would still have occurred. Answer only 'Yes' or 'No'.

features.name: counterfactual_instruction_clarity
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to consider counterfactual reasoning (e.g., 'what would have happened if the factor was absent'). 1 indicates the prompt clearly includes such instructions, 0 indicates it does not. This directly affects performance because explicit counterfactual guidance improves the AI's ability to assess causality by evaluating alternative scenarios.

features.name: sequence_analysis_instruction
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to analyze the sequence of events in the scenario. 1 indicates the prompt includes such instructions, 0 indicates it does not. This affects performance because understanding event sequences helps the AI determine the temporal and causal relationship between the factor and the outcome.

features.name: alternative_explanations_instruction
features.description: Measures whether the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to consider alternative explanations for the outcome. 1 indicates the prompt includes such instructions, 0 indicates it does not. This affects performance because evaluating alternative explanations strengthens the AI’s ability to distinguish between correlation and causation.
